question_intent: Total points scored by players who won at least one All-Star award and played for teams that won at least one playoff series

plan.question_intent: Total points scored by players who won at least one All-Star award and played for teams that won at least one playoff series
plan.detail_query: SELECT s.playerid, s.year, s.tmid, s.pts, a.award FROM scoring AS s JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid WHERE a.award LIKE '%All-Star%' AND s.tmid IN (SELECT tmidwinner FROM seriespost) AND s.year = a.year

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT s.playerid, s.year, s.tmid, s.pts, a.award
join_clauses: JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN seriespost AS sp ON s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid AND s.year = t.year
blocks.notes: Joins scoring, awardsplayers, seriespost, and teams to get player points, All-Star awards, and playoff wins

blocks.name: root
blocks.notes: Aggregates the total points from the leaf block

build_logs.notes: Joins scoring, awardsplayers, seriespost, and teams to get player points, All-Star awards, and playoff wins

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN seriespost AS sp ON s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN seriespost AS sp ON s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid AND s.year = t.year
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN seriespost AS sp ON s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid AND s.year = t.year
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid AND s.year = t.year AND s.lgid = t.lgid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN seriespost AS sp ON s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid AND s.year = t.year AND s.lgid = t.lgid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid AND s.year = t.year
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN seriespost AS sp ON s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid AND s.year = t.year
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN seriespost AS sp ON s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN seriespost AS sp ON s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (a.award LIKE '%All-Star%')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN seriespost AS sp ON s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (a.award LIKE '%All-Star%') AND (s.year = a.year)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN seriespost AS sp ON s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (a.award LIKE '%All-Star%') AND (s.year = sp.year)
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: s.year = sp.year OR sp.year IS NULL
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN seriespost AS sp ON s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (a.award LIKE '%All-Star%') AND (s.year = sp.year OR sp.year IS NULL)
LIMIT 5

JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (a.award LIKE '%All-Star%') AND (s.year = sp.year AND a.year = sp.year)

JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid

steps.sql:
SELECT s.playerid, s.year, s.tmid, s.pts, a.award
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN seriespost AS sp ON s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (a.award LIKE '%All-Star%')

build_logs.notes: Aggregates the total points from the leaf block

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT s.playerid, s.year, s.tmid, s.pts, a.award
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN seriespost AS sp ON s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (a.award LIKE '%All-Star%')) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT SUM(pts) AS total_points
FROM (SELECT s.playerid, s.year, s.tmid, s.pts, a.award
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN seriespost AS sp ON s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (a.award LIKE '%All-Star%')) AS leaf_1

question: What is the total number of points scored by players who received an All-Star award, summed across all such players, seasons, and teams?
